top_findings.summary: The skill requests Edit, Grep, and Glob permissions which are not clearly justified by the stated purpose of inventory optimization calculations. While Read and Write are reasonable for accessing inventory data files and writing reports, the Edit permission (which implies modifying existing files), Grep (searching through file contents), and Glob (file pattern matching) are excessive for a skill primarily performing mathematical calculations and analysis on provided structured data. These broad filesystem permissions could allow the skill to access and modify unrelated system or user files beyond inventory data, creating unnecessary security exposure.
